steps.title: Recognize percentage growth creates exponential model
steps.content:
A 2.7% increase each year means multiplying by $1 + 0.027 = 1.027$ each year, not adding a fixed amount. After $t$ years, the balance is:
$$A(t) = 110 \times 1.027^t$$
This has exponential form (not linear) because we multiply by the same factor each year.

steps.title: Determine growth direction from the base
steps.content:
In an exponential function with base $r$:
  • If $r > 1$: the amount increases
  • If $r < 1$: the amount decreases
Here, $r = 1.027 > 1$, so the account grows over time.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content:
The model is:
  • Exponential (because $t$ is in the exponent)
  • Increasing (because \$1.027 > 1$)
This is increasing exponential growth. That matches choice C — C is correct.
